ariaSpec.usage: Describes the role of the component.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby (when has accessible name)
ariaSpec.usage: The input requires an accessible name (provided by consuming app).
Announces the mask or placeholder for the component.
Rendered when the MaskedTextBox is in an invalid state.
Points to the hint or error message.
Rendered when the MaskedTextBox is disabled.
